title: Adventurable Items
description: Allow you to customize whether or not items can be used to interact with blocks in adventure mode.
body:
# Intro
As we all know, players who are in adventure mode cannot use some items **to interact with blocks**.

This mod adds a config (you can find it in config/adventurableitems-common.toml) to help customize this. Items in the config list will be able to be used by adventure mode players.

Also allow every item to be used in adventure mode (disabled by default, configurable too).

Meant to be used with [Modern Inhibited](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/modern-inhibited).

Both sides required.
## Misc
